info.+content: Watashi ni Konna Kuchi Kiite, Oya Gatcha Shippai shita no ka
私にこんな口聞いて、親ガチャ失敗したのか

It’s easy to run your mouth on the internet, but what happens when you mouth off at an amateur porn star who’d be more than happy to fuck you silly for the views. This is the story of a gacha-addicted gamer girl who picks the wrong opponent to trash-talk. She may be a god gamer, but he’s a top streamer on Powhub… and her gamer girl skills don’t mean dick when he’s facefucking her. However, the same quick thinking, adaptability, and stubbornness that launched her to the top of the leaderboards kicks in, and she demands a rematch. With her pride as a gamer and his reputation as a pornstar on the line, they’ll fuck until one of them comes out on top… but what would happen if they squad up and become a power couple instead.
